briefdescription.para: Show malloc operations for debugging in very low mem environments.

memberdef.definition: typedef const char *(* nTransactionFn) (const char *, size_t, char **, uint32_t)
memberdef.name: nTransactionFn

memberdef.definition: typedef const char *(* nReceiveFn) (uint8_t *, uint32_t *, bool, uint32_t, uint32_t *)
memberdef.name: nReceiveFn

memberdef.definition: typedef const char *(* nTransmitFn) (uint8_t *, uint32_t, bool)
memberdef.name: nTransmitFn

briefdescription.para: Hook for the calling platform's debug interface, if any.
Hook for the calling platform's I2C lock function.
Hook for the calling platform's I2C unlock function.
Hook for the calling platform's Notecard lock function.
Hook for the calling platform's Notecard lock function.
Hook for the calling platform's transaction initiation function.
Hook for the calling platform's transaction completion function.
Hook for the calling platform's memory allocation function.
Hook for the calling platform's memory free function.
Hook for the calling platform's delay function.
Hook for the calling platform's millis timing function.
Hook for the calling platform's current active interface. Value is one of:
Hook for the calling platform's Serial reset function.
Hook for the calling platform's Serial transmit function.
Hook for the calling platform's Serial data available function.
Hook for the calling platform's Serial receive function.
Hook for the calling platform's I2C address.
Hook for the calling platform's I2C maximum segment size, in bytes.
Hook for the calling platform's I2C reset function.
Hook for the calling platform's transmit function.
Hook for the calling platform's I2C receive function.
Variable used to determine the runtime logging level.
Get the active, platform-specific communications method.

simplesect.para:
The active interface. One of:
NOTE_C_INTERFACE_NONE (default)
NOTE_C_INTERFACE_SERIAL
NOTE_C_INTERFACE_I2C

briefdescription.para: Set the desired, platform-specific communications method.

parameterdescription.para:
The desired interface to use. One of:
NOTE_C_INTERFACE_NONE (default)
NOTE_C_INTERFACE_SERIAL
NOTE_C_INTERFACE_I2C

memberdef.argsstring: (mallocFn mallocfn, freeFn freefn, delayMsFn delayfn, getMsFn millisfn)
memberdef.name: NoteSetFnDefault

briefdescription.para: Set the default memory and timing hooks if they aren't already set.

parameterdescription.para: The default memory allocation malloc function to use.
The default memory free function to use.
The default delay function to use.
The default 'millis' function to use.

memberdef.argsstring: (mallocFn mallocHook, freeFn freeHook, delayMsFn delayMsHook, getMsFn getMsHook)
memberdef.name: NoteSetFn

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific memory and timing hooks.

parameterdescription.para: The platform-specific memory allocation function (i.e. malloc).
The platform-specific memory free function (i.e. free).
The platform-specific millisecond delay function.
The platform-specific millisecond counter function.

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific debug output function.

parameterdescription.para: A function pointer to call for debug output.

briefdescription.para: Determine if a debug output function has been set.

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether a debug ouput function was provided.

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific transaction initiation/completion fn's.

parameterdescription.para: The platform-specific transaction initiation function to use.
The platform-specific transaction completion function to use. to use.

memberdef.argsstring: (mutexFn lockI2Cfn, mutexFn unlockI2Cfn, mutexFn lockNotefn, mutexFn unlockNotefn)
memberdef.name: NoteSetFnMutex

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific mutex functions for I2C and the Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: The platform-specific I2C lock function to use.
The platform-specific I2C unlock function to use.
The platform-specific Notecard lock function to use.
The platform-specific Notecard unlock function to use.

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific mutex functions for I2C.

parameterdescription.para: The platform-specific I2C lock function.
The platform-specific I2C unlock function.

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific mutex functions for the Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: The platform-specific Notecard lock function.
The platform-specific Notecard unlock function.

memberdef.argsstring: (serialResetFn resetFn, serialTransmitFn transmitFn, serialAvailableFn availFn, serialReceiveFn receiveFn)
memberdef.name: NoteSetFnSerial

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific hooks for communicating with the Notecard over serial.

parameterdescription.para: The platform-specific serial reset function.
The platform-specific serial transmit function.
The platform-specific serial available function.
The platform-specific serial receive function.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t notecardAddr, uint32_t maxTransmitSize, i2cResetFn resetFn, i2cTransmitFn transmitFn, i2cReceiveFn receiveFn)
memberdef.name: NoteSetFnI2C

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific hooks for communicating with the Notecard over I2C, as well as the I2C address of the Notecard and maximum transmission size.

parameterdescription.para: The I2C address of the Notecard. Pass 0 to use the default address.
The max number of bytes to send to the Notecard in a single I2C segment. Pass 0 to use the default maximum transmission size.
The platform-specific I2C reset function.
The platform-specific I2C transmit function.
The platform-specific I2C receive function.

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific communications method to be disabled.
Set the log level for the _DebugWithLevel function.

parameterdescription.para: The log level to set.

briefdescription.para: Write a number to the debug stream and output a newline.

parameterdescription.para: A debug string for output.
The number to write.

briefdescription.para: Write text to the debug stream and output a newline.

parameterdescription.para: A debug string for output.

briefdescription.para: Write to the debug stream.

parameterdescription.para: A debug string for output.

briefdescription.para: Write the message to the debug stream, if the level is less than or equal to NOTE_C_LOG_LEVEL. Otherwise, the message is dropped.

parameterdescription.para: The log level of the message. See the NOTE_C_LOG_LEVEL_* macros in note.h for possible values.
The debug message.

briefdescription.para: Same as NoteDebugWithLevel, but add a newline at the end.

parameterdescription.para: The log level of the message. See the NOTE_C_LOG_LEVEL_* macros in note.h for possible values.
The debug message.

briefdescription.para: Get the current milliseconds value from the platform-specific hook.
Delay milliseconds using the platform-specific hook.

parameterdescription.para: the milliseconds delay value.

briefdescription.para: Convert number to a hex string.

parameterdescription.para: the number
the buffer to return it into

briefdescription.para: Allocate a memory chunk using the platform-specific hook.

parameterdescription.para: the number of bytes to allocate.

briefdescription.para: Free memory using the platform-specific hook.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to the memory address to free.

briefdescription.para: Lock the I2C bus using the platform-specific hook.
Unlock the I2C bus using the platform-specific hook.
Lock the Notecard using the platform-specific hook.
Unlock the Notecard using the platform-specific hook.
Indicate that we're initiating a transaction using the platform-specific hook.
Indicate that we've completed a transaction using the platform-specific hook.
Get the platform-specific debug output function.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the debug output function pointer.

briefdescription.para: Get the platform-specific transaction functions.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the transaction start function pointer.
Pointer to store the transaction stop function pointer.

briefdescription.para: Get the platform-specific mutex functions for I2C and Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the I2C lock function pointer.
Pointer to store the I2C unlock function pointer.
Pointer to store the Notecard lock function pointer.
Pointer to store the Notecard unlock function pointer.

briefdescription.para: Get the platform-specific mutex functions for I2C.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the I2C lock function pointer.
Pointer to store the I2C unlock function pointer.

briefdescription.para: Get the platform-specific mutex functions for the Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the Notecard lock function pointer.
Pointer to store the Notecard unlock function pointer.

briefdescription.para: Get the platform-specific memory and timing hooks.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the memory allocation function pointer.
Pointer to store the memory free function pointer.
Pointer to store the delay function pointer.
Pointer to store the millis function pointer.

briefdescription.para: Get the platform-specific hooks for serial communication.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the serial reset function pointer.
Pointer to store the serial transmit function pointer.
Pointer to store the serial available function pointer.
Pointer to store the serial receive function pointer.

briefdescription.para: Get the platform-specific hooks for I2C communication.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the I2C address.
Pointer to store the I2C maximum segment size.
Pointer to store the I2C reset function pointer.
Pointer to store the I2C transmit function pointer.
Pointer to store the I2C receive function pointer.

briefdescription.para: Get the I2C address of the Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the I2C address.

briefdescription.para: Reset the Serial bus using the platform-specific hook.

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether the Serial bus was reset successfully.

briefdescription.para: Transmit bytes over Serial using the platform-specific hook.

parameterdescription.para: The bytes to transmit.
The length of bytes.
true to flush the bytes upon transmit.

briefdescription.para: Determine if Serial bus is available using the platform-specific hook.

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether the Serial bus is available to read.

briefdescription.para: Obtain a character from the Serial bus using the platform-specific hook.

simplesect.para: A character from the Serial bus.

briefdescription.para: Reset the I2C bus using the platform-specific hook.

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether the I2C bus was reset successfully.

briefdescription.para: Transmit bytes over I2C using the platform-specific hook.

parameterdescription.para: the I2C address for transmission.
The bytes to transmit.
The length of bytes.

simplesect.para: A c-string from the platform-specific hook, or an error string if the bus is not active.

briefdescription.para: Receive bytes from I2C using the platform-specific hook.

parameterdescription.para: the I2C address for transmission.
(out) A buffer in which to place received bytes.
The length of bytes.
(out) The number of bytes left to read.

simplesect.para: A c-string from the platform-specific hook, or an error string if the bus is not active.

briefdescription.para: Get the I2C address of the Notecard.
Set the I2C address for communication with the Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: the I2C address to use for the Notecard.

briefdescription.para: Determine the maximum number of bytes for each segment of data sent to the Notecard over I2C.

simplesect.para: A 32-bit integer of the maximum number of bytes per I2C segment.

briefdescription.para: Perform a hard reset on the Notecard using the platform-specific hook.

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether the Notecard has been reset successfully.

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *request, size_t reqLen, char **response, uint32_t timeoutMs)
memberdef.name: _noteJSONTransaction

briefdescription.para: Perform a JSON request to the Notecard using the currently-set platform hook.

parameterdescription.para: A string containing the JSON request object, which MUST BE terminated with a newline character.
the string length of the JSON request.
[out] A c-string buffer that will contain the newline (' ') terminated JSON response from the Notercard. If NULL, no response will be captured.
The maximum amount of time, in milliseconds, to wait for data to arrive. Passing zero (0) disables the timeout.

simplesect.para: NULL if successful, or an error string if the transaction failed or the hook has not been set.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t *buffer, uint32_t *size, bool delay, uint32_t timeoutMs, uint32_t *available)
memberdef.name: _noteChunkedReceive

briefdescription.para: Receive bytes over from the Notecard using the currently-set platform hook.

parameterdescription.para: A buffer to receive bytes into.

(in/out)
(in) The size of the buffer in bytes.
(out) The length of the received data in bytes.
Respect standard processing delays.
The maximum amount of time, in milliseconds, to wait for data to arrive. Passing zero (0) disables the timeout.

(in/out)
(in) The amount of bytes to request. Sending zero (0) will initiate a priming query when using the I2C interface.
(out) The amount of bytes unable to fit into the provided buffer.

simplesect.para: A c-string with an error, or NULL if no error ocurred.

briefdescription.para: Transmit bytes over to the Notecard using the currently-set platform hook.

parameterdescription.para: A buffer of bytes to transmit.
The count of bytes in the buffer to send
Respect standard processing delays.

simplesect.para: A c-string with an error, or NULL if no error ocurred.

detaileddescription.para: Hooks allow libraries dependent on note-c to provide platform- or MCU-specific functions for common functions like I2C locking/unlocking, memory allocation and freeing, delays, and communicating with the Notecard over I2C and Serial. Using these hooks, note-c is able to manage Notecard transaction logic, and defer to platform functionality, when needed.
Written by Ray Ozzie and Blues Inc. team.
